text:
Created attachment 221192
libuninameslist-20200413.patch

* Update to 20200413
* Update distinfo
* Update pkg-plist

JOBS would fail for my in poudriere for any i386 arch. I am unsure as to why this is, but just in case, MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE was set.

Changelogs:

https://github.com/fontforge/libuninameslist/releases/tag/20200313
https://github.com/fontforge/libuninameslist/releases/tag/20200413

Tested with poudriere for 11-i386, 11-amd64, 12-i386 and 12-amd64. Passed portlint.
